TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Joko_Widodo, title = Joko_Widodo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joko_Widodo} }

S.FORM: == Joko Widodo == I 1961 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joko Widodo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Indonesia anini i ci Joko Widodo, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Nai 2005 tangasa i 2012 a miheca malakakelidan no Solaciyata , itini to 2012 tangasa to 2014 malakakelidan no Yaciata . laloma'an Śģ∂Śļ≠ I 1986 miheca malalamod aci Iliyana (Iriana), I 1988 miheca saka 10 folad saka 1 romi'ad ci wawa to fainayan ci Kiporan Rakapoming Raka (Gibran Rakabuming Raka), i 1991 miheca saka 4 folda saka 20 romi'ad ci wawa to fafahiyan ci Kahiyang Awo (Kahiyang Ayu), i 1994 miheca saka 12folad saka 25 romi'ad ci wawa ho to fainayan ci Kasang Pangarep (Kaesang Pangarep). O wawa ningra tatos mitiliday i Sinkapor. Sasepay to ko suna ni Joko Widodo. Pasifana' śēôŤā≤ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Ci Iriyana (Iriana) ko fafahi ni Jokowi, i 1963 miheca saka mo^etep a folad ko kahofocan nira, 2014 miheca saka mo^etep a folad, malafahahi tono congtong ci Jokowian, Yamala kakeridan ho no Yiciyata a niyaro' i, O kakeridan no sakanga'ayay no kilomaan to palatamdaway a katayalan , to ci Lliyana, ono Intonisiya kapolongan no onto no fafahiyan. itini to 2005 miheca tangasa i 2012 miheca, matayal a malakakeridan tono Solakaeta , ttiya ho o Śłāťē∑ no Solakaeta ci Jokowi. pitooran Śģóśēô mikapot to sieci Śä†ŚÖ•śĒŅś≤Ľ I 2012 a miheca saka polo' a folad mikomod ci Ciyokowi, mikelid misafa^loh to Yaciyata , itiya iraay ko mirarakatay a mipatenakay to sowal, ano mirarakat ko malatapangay i, o misatengitengilay to ngiha no finawlan, ano ira ko kacango'otang no i niyaro'ay, padama'en to ni Ciyokowi. Falicen nira ko tatiihay a demak no citodongay, milowan to caay ka fangcal a pinangan. Oromasato misafangcal to 'orip no tamdamdaw, mipatireng to sakanga'ay no paisingan ato misakapah to lalan no nanom, caay to mamiliyaw a ira ko lenlen, mipatireng to pirakatan no seraay a marad. natayalan šļčŤĻü Mikomod a mamisinkiw ci Jokowi i, alomanay ko maolahay cingraan, itini tona PDI-P hananay, o tadacifenekay a tamdaw cingra. Aloman aloman ko mitopaay cingraan, tayni sato i 2014 a miheca saka 7 a folad 22 a romi'ad ko pikomod ningra to mamalacontong, caay ka pihai koya ci Polapaw Sopianto , maketer cingra, sowal sa
S.PHON: == *o~uko~u wi…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u == i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *o~uko~u wi…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u in…¨~…ģo~un…ôsia anini i ¶i *o~uko~u wi…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. nai **** taŇčasa i **** a mińß…ô ¶a ma…ĺakak…ô…ĺi…¨~…ģan no~u so~u…ĺa ¶ijata , itini to~u **** taŇčasa to~u **** ma…ĺakak…ô…ĺi…¨~…ģan no~u ja ¶iata . …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ** i **** mińß…ô ¶a ma…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ a ¶i i…ĺijana (iriana), i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ¶i wawa to~u fainajan ¶i kipo~uran rakapo~umiŇč raka (*ib~b~vran rakab~b~vo~u~umiŇč raka), i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺ…¨~…ģa saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ¶i wawa to~u fafańßijan ¶i kańßijaŇč awo~u (kańßijaŇč ajo~u~u), i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka **fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ¶i wawa ńßo~u to~u fainajan ¶i kasaŇč paŇčar…ôp (ka…ôsaŇč paŇčar…ôp). o~u wawa niŇčra tato~us miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj i sinkapo~ur. sas…ôpaj to~u ko~u so~u~una ni *o~uko~u wi…¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u. pasifana ° ** …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** ¶i irijana (iriana) ko~u fafańßi ni *o~uko~uwi, i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka mo~u Ē…ôt…ôp a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶an nira, **** mińß…ô ¶a saka mo~u Ē…ôt…ôp a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺafańßańßi to~uno~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč ¶i *o~uko~uwian, jama…ĺa kak…ôri…¨~…ģan ńßo~u no~u ji ¶ijata a nijaro~u ° i, o~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan no~u sakaŇča °ajaj no~u ki…ĺo~umaan to~u pa…ĺatam…¨~…ģawaj a kataja…ĺan , to~u ¶i …ĺ…ĺijana, o~uno~u into~unisija kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan no~u o~unto~u no~u fafańßijan. itini to~u **** mińß…ô ¶a taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mataja…ĺ a ma…ĺakak…ôri…¨~…ģan to~uno~u so~u…ĺaka…ôta , ttija ńßo~u o~u ** no~u so~u…ĺaka…ôta ¶i *o~uko~uwi. pito~uo~uran ** mikapo~ut to~u si…ô ¶i **** i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka po~u…ĺo~u ° a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ miko~umo~u…¨~…ģ ¶i ¶ijo~uko~uwi, mik…ô…ĺi…¨~…ģ misafa Ē…ĺo~uńß to~u ja ¶ijata , itija iraaj ko~u mirarakataj a mipat…ônakaj to~u so~uwa…ĺ, ano~u mirarakat ko~u ma…ĺatapaŇčaj i, o~u misat…ôŇčit…ôŇči…ĺaj to~u Ňčińßa no~u finaw…ĺan, ano~u ira ko~u ka ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaŇč no~u i nijaro~u °aj, pa…¨~…ģama °…ôn to~u ni ¶ijo~uko~uwi. fa…ĺi ¶…ôn nira ko~u tatiińßaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj, mi…ĺo~uwan to~u ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ a pinaŇčan. o~uro~umasato~u misafaŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw, mipatir…ôŇč to~u sakaŇča °aj no~u paisiŇčan ato~u misakapańß to~u …ĺa…ĺan no~u nano~um, ¶aaj to~u mami…ĺijaw a ira ko~u …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn, mipatir…ôŇč to~u pirakatan no~u s…ôraaj a mara…¨~…ģ. nataja…ĺan ** miko~umo~u…¨~…ģ a mamisinkiw ¶i *o~uko~uwi i, a…ĺo~umanaj ko~u mao~u…ĺańßaj ¶iŇčraan, itini to~una p…¨~…ģi-p ńßananaj, o~u ta…¨~…ģa ¶if…ôn…ôkaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶iŇčra. a…ĺo~uman a…ĺo~uman ko~u mito~upaaj ¶iŇčraan, tajni sato~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ko~u piko~umo~u…¨~…ģ niŇčra to~u mama…ĺa ¶o~unto~uŇč, ¶aaj ka pińßai ko~uja ¶i po~u…ĺapaw so~upianto~u , mak…ôt…ôr ¶iŇčra, so~uwa…ĺ sa
S.FORM: == Joko Widodo == I 1961 a miheca saka 6 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Joko Widodo, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Indonesia anini i ci Joko Widodo, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 20 a romi'ad. Nai 2005 tangasa i 2012 a miheca malakakelidan no Solaciyata , itini to 2012 tangasa to 2014 malakakelidan no Yaciata . laloma'an Śģ∂Śļ≠ I 1986 miheca malalamod aci Iliyana (Iriana), I 1988 miheca saka 10 folad saka 1 romi'ad ci wawa to fainayan ci Kiporan Rakapoming Raka (Gibran Rakabuming Raka), i 1991 miheca saka 4 folda saka 20 romi'ad ci wawa to fafahiyan ci Kahiyang Awo (Kahiyang Ayu), i 1994 miheca saka 12folad saka 25 romi'ad ci wawa ho to fainayan ci Kasang Pangarep (Kaesang Pangarep). O wawa ningra tatos mitiliday i Sinkapor. Sasepay to ko suna ni Joko Widodo. Pasifana' śēôŤā≤ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ Ci Iriyana (Iriana) ko fafahi ni Jokowi, i 1963 miheca saka mo^etep a folad ko kahofocan nira, 2014 miheca saka mo^etep a folad, malafahahi tono congtong ci Jokowian, Yamala kakeridan ho no Yiciyata a niyaro' i, O kakeridan no sakanga'ayay no kilomaan to palatamdaway a katayalan , to ci Lliyana, ono Intonisiya kapolongan no onto no fafahiyan. itini to 2005 miheca tangasa i 2012 miheca, matayal a malakakeridan tono Solakaeta , ttiya ho o Śłāťē∑ no Solakaeta ci Jokowi. pitooran Śģóśēô mikapot to sieci Śä†ŚÖ•śĒŅś≤Ľ I 2012 a miheca saka polo' a folad mikomod ci Ciyokowi, mikelid misafa^loh to Yaciyata , itiya iraay ko mirarakatay a mipatenakay to sowal, ano mirarakat ko malatapangay i, o misatengitengilay to ngiha no finawlan, ano ira ko kacango'otang no i niyaro'ay, padama'en to ni Ciyokowi. Falicen nira ko tatiihay a demak no citodongay, milowan to caay ka fangcal a pinangan. Oromasato misafangcal to 'orip no tamdamdaw, mipatireng to sakanga'ay no paisingan ato misakapah to lalan no nanom, caay to mamiliyaw a ira ko lenlen, mipatireng to pirakatan no seraay a marad. natayalan šļčŤĻü Mikomod a mamisinkiw ci Jokowi i, alomanay ko maolahay cingraan, itini tona PDI-P hananay, o tadacifenekay a tamdaw cingra. Aloman aloman ko mitopaay cingraan, tayni sato i 2014 a miheca saka 7 a folad 22 a romi'ad ko pikomod ningra to mamalacontong, caay ka pihai koya ci Polapaw Sopianto , maketer cingra, sowal sa

*o~uko~uwi, i **** mińß…ô ¶a saka mo~u Ē…ôt…ôp a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ko~u kańßo~ufo~u ¶an nira, **** mińß…ô ¶a saka mo~u Ē…ôt…ôp a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺafańßańßi to~uno~u ¶o~uŇčto~uŇč ¶i *o~uko~uwian, jama…ĺa no~u o~unto~u no~u fafańßijan. itini to~u **** mińß…ô ¶a taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mataja…ĺ a ma…ĺakak…ôri…¨~…ģan to~uno~u so~u…ĺaka…ôta , ttija ńßo~u o~u ** no~u so~u…ĺaka…ôta ¶i *o~uko~uwi. mirarakataj a mipat…ônakaj to~u so~uwa…ĺ, ano~u mirarakat ko~u ma…ĺatapaŇčaj i, o~u misat…ôŇčit…ôŇči…ĺaj to~u Ňčińßa no~u finaw…ĺan, ano~u ira ko~u ka ¶aŇčo~u °o~utaŇč no~u i nijaro~u °aj, pa…¨~…ģama °…ôn to~u ni ¶ijo~uko~uwi. fa…ĺi ¶…ôn nira ko~u tatiińßaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak no~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj, mi…ĺo~uwan to~u ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ a pinaŇčan. o~uro~umasato~u misafaŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u °o~urip no~u tam…¨~…ģam…¨~…ģaw, mipatir…ôŇč to~u sakaŇča °aj no~u paisiŇčan ato~u misakapańß to~u …ĺa…ĺan no~u nano~um, ¶aaj to~u mami…ĺijaw a ira ko~u …ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn, mipatir…ôŇč to~u pirakatan no~u s…ôraaj a mara…¨~…ģ. nataja…ĺan ** miko~umo~u…¨~…ģ a mamisinkiw ¶i *o~uko~uwi i, a…ĺo~umanaj ko~u mao~u…ĺańßaj ¶iŇčraan, itini to~una p…¨~…ģi-p ńßananaj, o~u ta…¨~…ģa ¶if…ôn…ôkaj a tam…¨~…ģaw ¶iŇčra. a…ĺo~uman a…ĺo~uman ko~u mito~upaaj ¶iŇčraan, tajni sato~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ ko~u piko~umo~u…¨~…ģ niŇčra to~u mama…ĺa ¶o~unto~uŇč, ¶aaj ka pińßai ko~uja ¶i po~u…ĺapaw
